# tenableio_asset (Data Source)

Retrieves details for a single asset from Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The UUID of the asset.

### Read-Only

- `agent_name` (List of String) Tenable agent names associated with the asset.
- `created_at` (String) When the asset record was created.
- `first_seen` (String) When the asset was first seen.
- `fqdn` (List of String) Fully qualified domain names associated with the asset.
- `has_agent` (Boolean) Whether the asset has a Tenable agent installed.
- `has_plugin_results` (Boolean) Whether the asset has plugin results.
- `hostname` (List of String) Hostnames associated with the asset.
- `ipv4` (List of String) IPv4 addresses associated with the asset.
- `ipv6` (List of String) IPv6 addresses associated with the asset.
- `last_seen` (String) When the asset was last seen.
- `mac_address` (List of String) MAC addresses associated with the asset.
- `netbios_name` (List of String) NetBIOS names associated with the asset.
- `operating_system` (List of String) Operating systems detected on the asset.
- `system_type` (String) The system type of the asset.
- `updated_at` (String) When the asset record was last updated.
